inputs.label: Symbol 1 (leftmost)
inputs.businessContext: Value of the first Roman numeral symbol (e.g., M=1000, C=100, X=10, I=1). Enter 0 if unused.

businessContext_i18n.en: Value of the first Roman numeral symbol (e.g., M=1000, C=100, X=10, I=1). Enter 0 if unused.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Birinci Roma rakamı sembolünün değeri (örneğin M=1000, C=100, X=10, I=1). Kullanılmıyorsa 0 girin.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wert des ersten römischen Zahlzeichens (z.B. M=1000, C=100, X=10, I=1). 0 eingeben, wenn nicht verwendet.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur du premier symbole romain (ex: M=1000, C=100, X=10, I=1). Entrez 0 si inutilisé.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor del primer símbolo de numeración romana (ej. M=1000, C=100, X=10, I=1). Ingrese 0 si no se usa.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قيمة الرمز الروماني الأول (مثال: M=1000، C=100، X=10، I=1). أدخل 0 إذا لم يُستخدم.

breakdown: Step 1: Enter the values of Roman numeral symbols (I=1, V=5, X=10, L=50, C=100, D=500, M=1000) in order from left to right.
Step 2: The calculator applies subtractive notation: for each pair, if a symbol is smaller than the next, its value is subtracted; otherwise it is added.
Step 3: The final result is the equivalent Arabic number.
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
